entries.text: Media gallery: YouTube links in Video URL open as an embedded player in the lightbox; optional auto thumbnail when no image URL is set
Media gallery: in dev admin mode, per-item edit / reorder / delete controls work again (gallery tiles are no longer nested buttons)
Steam library written reviews and media gallery entries updated
Public launch — portfolio, contact card, and gaming-themed shell are live
QA portfolio, downloadable resume, side projects, tech loadout, and media gallery
Steam library with owned games, stats, written reviews, tier list, and wishlist tabs
Livestream page (Twitch), scrolling credits, and this patch notes changelog
Settings for palette, CRT overlay, scanlines, color-vision filters, motion, and UI sounds
Main menu status panel with connection readout and latest-patch preview
Desktop split layout at 1200px+ with menu and content side by side; standard routing on smaller viewports
Dedicated patch notes page backed by editable JSON
Status panel telemetry (browser, OS, connection) and patch detail modal
Page shell layout and navigation polish across story chapters
Focus and transition glitches when moving between menu and routes
Settings screen for appearance, accessibility, and audio
Optional sound effects on menu navigation and actions
Menu keyboard focus sticking after navigating to a page and back
Credits page with auto-scroll through acknowledgments
Livestream route with embedded Twitch player
Keyboard navigation and roving tabindex across main menu items
Boot sequence replaying on every return to home; now skipped after first completion (session)
Desktop split-view shell when the viewport is 1200px or wider
Steam integration: library JSON, filters, sorting, pagination, and game detail drawer
Navigation structure reworked for keyboard and screen-reader use
Responsive layout breakpoints on tablet-sized widths
QA portfolio timeline and project entries
Resume page with structured data and CV download
Side projects section
Color palette, typography scale, and component styling pass
Site rebuilt with React, Vite, and React Router
Boot sequence intro and main menu with animated particle background
Overall direction: retro terminal / game launcher presentation
